title: Writing Academic Abstracts
description: 150-word abstract: context, gap, method, results, implications.
summary_pt_br: Abstract em 5 movimentos (150 palavras): contexto, lacuna, método, resultados, implicações.

scenes.subtitle_en: 150-word abstract: context, gap, method, results, implications.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Abstract em 5 movimentos (150 palavras): contexto, lacuna, método, resultados, implicações.

scenes.text_en: 150-word abstract: context, gap, method, results, implications. Focus: writing academic abstracts. Prior studies have examined X but overlooked Y.
scenes.text_pt: Abstract em 5 movimentos (150 palavras): contexto, lacuna, método, resultados, implicações. Foco: writing academic abstracts. Estudos anteriores examinaram X mas negligenciaram Y.

scenes.title: Writing Academic Abstracts
scenes.body_en: Five moves in ~150 words: 1) Set context. 2) State the gap. 3) Describe method. 4) Summarize results. 5) State implications. Passive voice, hedged claims.
scenes.body_pt: Abstract em 5 movimentos (150 palavras): contexto, lacuna, método, resultados, implicações.

examples.en: Prior studies have examined X but overlooked Y.
examples.pt: Estudos anteriores examinaram X mas negligenciaram Y.

examples.en: This paper addresses that gap by analyzing 200 cases.
examples.pt: Este artigo preenche essa lacuna analisando 200 casos.

examples.en: Findings suggest implications for both policy and practice.
examples.pt: Os achados sugerem implicações para política e prática.

exercise.question: Complete: "Prior studies have examined X but ___ Y."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Prior studies have examined X but overlooked Y."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Estudos anteriores examinaram X mas negligenciaram Y.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
This paper addresses that gap by analyzing 200 cases.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "This paper addresses that gap by analyzing 200 cases."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Este artigo preenche essa lacuna analisando 200 casos.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Writing Academic Abstracts — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre writing academic abstracts. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Remote work has grown rapidly since 2020.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Few studies isolate long-term productivity effects.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We analyzed 300 teams across three years.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Remote teams outperformed hybrids on deep work.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Findings inform policy for distributed organizations.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Five moves, 150 words, infinite rejections avoided.

scenes.title: The journal submission
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the abstract's five moves. Use academic phrasing.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Kumar read his doctoral student's latest abstract aloud, pausing at each of its five structural moves.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Prior studies have examined remote work but overlooked its long-term effects on deep knowledge work.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: This paper addresses that gap by analyzing three hundred teams over a three-year observational window.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Findings suggest that fully remote teams outperform hybrid arrangements specifically on extended focus tasks.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: The implications inform hiring policy and remote-work infrastructure design at medium-sized tech firms.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: A strong abstract, Kumar always taught, promises nothing it cannot deliver — and delivers everything it promises.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Writing Academic Abstracts". 150-word abstract: context, gap, method, results, implications. Prior studies have examined X but overlooked Y. This paper addresses that gap by analyzing 200 cases. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Writing Academic Abstracts". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Writing Academic Abstracts".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Writing Academic Abstracts".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
